---
title: Theory
---

# Theoretical Background

The physics, derivations, and conventions behind NumCosmo's models. Each page is
linked from the corresponding API documentation, and links back to the relevant
classes and methods.

## Background & Thermal History

- [Cosmological Distances](distances.qmd) — comoving, transverse, luminosity, and angular diameter distances.
- [Cosmic Recombination](recombination.qmd) — Saha equilibrium, the Seager solver, optical depth and visibility.

## Linear Theory & Power Spectrum

- [Eisenstein–Hu Transfer Function](transfer_func_eh.qmd) — the EH (1998) fitting formula, with and without baryons.

## Clusters & Weak Lensing

- [Halo Density Profiles](halo_density_profile.qmd) — NFW, Einasto, and Hernquist profiles and their projected quantities.
- [Weak-Lensing Surface Mass Density](wl_surface_mass_density.qmd) — projected surface density, convergence, and shear.

## Numerical Methods

- [FFTLog](fftlog.qmd) — logarithmic fast Fourier transform.
- [CSQ1D Formalism](csq1d.qmd) — complex-structure evolution of a time-dependent oscillator.
